Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 170 

SR_SPLMTL_EDCTN_2_SW 

LABEL: Supplemental HRSN Education 2: Want Help with School or Training 

DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) Supplemental health related social need (HRSN) education where patient wants 
help with school or training. 

LONG NAME: SR_SPLMTL_EDCTN_2_SW 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 
Missing 

COMMENT: Variables
